title: Learn AWS IAM in less than 10 minutes
summary: A YouTube educational video from AWS Developers explaining AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) fundamentals in under 10 minutes. The video covers users, roles, policies, least privilege principles, IAM Access Analyzer, and security best practices for beginners managing access control in AWS accounts.
